ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "lincs_pert_id" TEXT /* LINCS Perturbation ID for the compound */,
  "gene_targets" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of gene targets affected by the compound */,
  "compound_type" TEXT /* Type of compound (e.g., small molecule, protein, antibody) */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the compound in water or other solvents */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability of the compound under different conditions */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compound (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the compound (e.g., SMILES string) */,
  "approved_for_clinical_trials" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the compound is approved for clinical trials */,
  "approved_for_clinical_use" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the compound is approved for clinical use */,
  "clinical_trial_phase" TEXT /* Current phase of clinical trials (e.g., Phase I, Phase II) */,
  "toxicity_profile" TEXT /* Summary of the compound's toxicity profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the compound was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the compound's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the cell line is derived (e.g., human, mouse) */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the cell line represents (e.g., liver, prostate) */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* Disease state of the cell line (e.g., cancer, normal) */,
  "genetic_modifications" TEXT /* Any genetic modifications made to the cell line */,
  "culture_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the cell line is cultured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cell line was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cell line's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound used in the experiment */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line used in the experiment */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the compound used */,
  "exposure_time" TEXT /* Duration of exposure to the compound */,
  "signature_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene expression signature */,
  "similarity" REAL /* Similarity score of the gene expression profile */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating the statistical significance of the results */,
  "n_genes" INTEGER /* Number of genes affected by the compound */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the experiment data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the experiment data */,
  "replicate_count" INTEGER /* Number of replicates performed */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* ID of the batch in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the experiment's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_targets" (
  "gene_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene target */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function or role */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene (e.g., CYP1A2) */,
  "gene_ensembl_id" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "gene_location" TEXT /* Chromosomal location of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene */,
  "gene_expression_level" TEXT /* Baseline expression level of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene target was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the gene target's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_gene_targets" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "gene_target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene target */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Measure of the effect size of the compound on the gene target */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the effect size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_gene_targets_gene_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_target_id") REFERENCES gene_targets ("gene_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_gene_targets_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
